title: AN ACT CREATING TWO ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT PROVINCIAL FISCALS IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5375 / 60 OG No. 5, 644 (February 3, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3818, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CREATING TWO ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT PROVINCIAL FISCALS IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There are hereby created two additional positions of assistant provincial fiscal in the Province of Ilocos Sur, with salaries at six thousand pesos

per annum

each.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
